title: Print All Subarrays with Given Sum K
description:
Given an array of integers and a target sum `k`, find all subarrays that sum to `k`.

Return an array of subarrays, where each subarray is represented as `[start, end]` indices.
hints: Use prefix sum technique with a hash map.
If sum - k exists in the map, we found a subarray.
Store all indices where each sum occurs to find all subarrays.
